pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if source/target levels remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) for modern testing support.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is legacy; JUnit 5 is required for modern test runners and compatibility with newer frameworks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support Java 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from separate source/target to unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures consistent module path usage in Java 9+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with JUnit 5 and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions do not support JUnit 5 Jupiter engine or may fail on Java 21.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer on the classpath by default, causing compilation errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer on the classpath by default, causing compilation errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Migrate test imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 annotations and assertions.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test) are not compatible with JUnit 5 runners and will cause compilation errors or test discovery failures in a Spring Boot 3 / JUnit 5 environment.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Add import for JUnit 5 assertThrows assertion.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: The assertThrows method is required for the new exception handling pattern and does not exist in JUnit 4.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test(expected=...) with JUnit 5 assertThrows for exception testing.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: JUnit 5 @Test annotation does not support the 'expected' attribute; using it results in a compilation error or ignored expectation.

src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test(expected=...) with JUnit 5 assertThrows for exception testing in second test method.
src/test/java/eu/kartoffelquadrat/bookst.why_exists: JUnit 5 @Test annotation does not support the 'expected' attribute; using it results in a compilation error or ignored expectation.
